hero.title: Quality education,
hero.subtitle: Thousands of learning resources, smart quizzes and an AI assistant — free of charge, for every Cameroonian student.

about.title:
Born from personal experience,
built for a generation.
about.text: VALIDE is a Cameroonian EdTech startup founded in 2022 by Frank Tchatseu. A former student of the Bilingual High School of Koutaba, he experienced firsthand the lack of educational resources. Today, he has decided that no young person will miss their dreams due to a lack of materials.
about.mission_text: Make quality education accessible to every Cameroonian student, in cities and remote areas alike.
about.vision_text: Build a competent generation capable of transforming Cameroon and Africa.
about.quote: "No student should miss their dreams due to a lack of resources."

platforms.title:
Two platforms,
one single goal.
platforms.app_feat1: Past exam papers sorted by subject
platforms.web_target: For secondary school students — High schools & Colleges
platforms.web_feat1: Official papers: Bac, Probatoire, GCE, BPC (2021–2024)
platforms.web_feat2: Courses and sequence papers by subject
platforms.web_feat4: AI assistant available at any time

features.title:
Everything you need
to succeed.
features.feat1_text: Official papers, corrections and courses — organised by subject and level.
features.feat2_text: A teacher available 24/7. It doesn't give the answer — it teaches.
features.feat3_text: Generated based on your weaknesses. Detailed corrections after each session.
features.feat4_text: All resources accessible without internet. Designed for remote areas.

how.step1_text: Play Store / App Store for university · valide-school.com for secondary school
how.step2_text: Specify your class, level and difficult subjects
how.step3_text: Papers, corrections, courses — organised and accessible in one click
how.step4_text: Smart quizzes + corrections + AI assistant at any time

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Yes, VALIDE is 100% free. All resources, quizzes and the AI assistant are accessible at no cost to every student.
faq.q2: Does the app work without an internet connection?
faq.a2: Yes. VALIDE has an offline mode that allows access to downloaded resources without internet — ideal for remote areas.
faq.q3: Which universities are covered by VALIDE?
faq.a3: VALIDE currently covers the University of Yaoundé I and II, with a progressive expansion to other Cameroonian universities.
faq.q4: How does the AI personalise quizzes?
faq.a4: The AI analyses your results and mistakes to generate quizzes targeted at your weak points, with detailed corrections after each session.
faq.q5: Is VALIDE School different from the VALIDE app?
faq.a5: Yes. The VALIDE app targets university students (UY1 & UY2), while VALIDE School is a web platform dedicated to secondary school students.
